label: Tc
evidence: Supplementary Table 2 from the atlas paper (DOI: 10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x) provides a mapping of cluster labels to cell type names, showing that 'Tc' refers to 'Cytotoxic T cell (CD8+ T cell)' in the classification of immune cell types in both fetal and adult skin. This name is also used in Extended Data Figure 12g–i and corresponding dataset annotations.
